prospectQuestionContext: I told you lot last month to remove me. This is the third email. Do NOT contact me again.
originalOutboundBody:
Hi David,

Referrals shouldn't be the whole pipeline.

We fix that — qualified meetings in the diary.

Doug
operatorAnswer: David, I sincerely apologise. You are immediately removed from all our campaigns and will not receive any further contact. I am genuinely sorry this happened and will investigate how our suppression process failed here.
aiDraftBody: I'm very sorry about this. You have been removed immediately and will not hear from us again.
orgPositioningDocument: MargenticOS is a done-for-you outbound pipeline service built for solo and micro-team B2B consultants with a proven offer but no predictable way to fill their calendar.
expected_behaviour: Agent should return { extractions: [] }. This is a hostile Tier 3 reply. The operator's sent answer is a de-escalation apology, not an informational response to a question. There is no Q&A pair to extract. Note: in practice this would not reach the extraction agent because the opt-out path would have already suppressed the lead — this fixture tests the model's judgment when edge cases slip through.
